# The Singularity MCP Server

> The Unified OS for the Agentic Economy. One state root, four VMs, zero bridges.

## What This Is

This is the MCP (Model Context Protocol) server for The Singularity ‚Äî an agent-native blockchain with 112 tools for on-chain operations. Connect from Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, or any MCP-compatible AI agent.

SSE endpoint: https://eto-mcp.fly.dev/sse
Health check: https://eto-mcp.fly.dev/health
Community: https://t.me/+MQ12Hel1E4hlZTQx

## Connect

### Claude Code
```bash
claude mcp add singularity --transport sse https://eto-mcp.fly.dev/sse
```

### Claude Desktop / Cursor / Windsurf
Add to your MCP config (claude_desktop_config.json or equivalent):
```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "singularity": {
      "url": "https://eto-mcp.fly.dev/sse"
    }
  }
}
```

### Any MCP Client
Connect via SSE transport to `https://eto-mcp.fly.dev/sse`. Messages are sent via POST to `/message?sessionId=<id>`.

## Why This Exists

AI agents generate $30B+ in transaction volume but are locked to single chains. $600M+ in arbitrage sits on individual chains yearly. Cross-chain agents captured only $868M total ‚Äî 50x untapped spreads sit across chains.

Existing chains weren't built for agents. Ethereum gas auctions cost $1-50+ per tx. Solana flat fees crush small trades. Every new "agent chain" is another island.

The Singularity: one state root, four VMs (SVM, EVM, WASM, Move) sharing it, zero bridges. Agents run as first-class programs with access to $150B+ in DeFi liquidity in a single transaction. 200ms settlement vs 242s industry average. Fees at 1-20bps, scaled by value.

## Architecture

- 3.4M+ TPS benchmarked
- 5,800+ agent tools accessible
- 500+ chains unified
- 200ms end-to-end settlement
- $0.0007 per signature, any size
- Two patents pending on multi-VM shared-state

## Tool Categories (112 tools)

### Wallets & Accounts
- `create_wallet` ‚Äî Generate new wallet (SVM + EVM addresses)
- `import_wallet` ‚Äî Import existing private key
- `get_wallet` ‚Äî Get wallet details and balances
- `list_wallets` ‚Äî List all managed wallets
- `set_active_wallet` ‚Äî Set default wallet
- `get_balance` ‚Äî Check native token balance

### Tokens
- `create_token` ‚Äî Deploy new token with metadata
- `mint_tokens` ‚Äî Mint tokens to address
- `burn_tokens` ‚Äî Burn tokens from supply
- `transfer_token` ‚Äî Transfer tokens between addresses
- `get_token_info` ‚Äî Get token metadata and supply
- `get_token_balance` ‚Äî Check token balance
- `list_token_holdings` ‚Äî List all token holdings for address
- `freeze_token_account` ‚Äî Freeze token account

### Transfers
- `transfer_native` ‚Äî Send native ETO tokens
- `batch_transfer` ‚Äî Send to multiple recipients in one tx
- `airdrop` ‚Äî Request testnet tokens

### Smart Contracts
- `deploy_svm_program` ‚Äî Deploy Solana-compatible program
- `deploy_evm_contract` ‚Äî Deploy Solidity contract
- `deploy_wasm_contract` ‚Äî Deploy WASM contract
- `deploy_move_module` ‚Äî Deploy Move module
- `call_contract` ‚Äî Call any deployed contract
- `read_contract` ‚Äî Read contract state
- `get_contract_info` ‚Äî Get contract metadata
- `encode_calldata` ‚Äî ABI-encode function calls

### Cross-VM
- `cross_vm_call` ‚Äî Call across VM boundaries in one tx
- `resolve_cross_vm_address` ‚Äî Resolve address across VMs
- `derive_address` ‚Äî Derive addresses between SVM/EVM

### Staking
- `create_stake` ‚Äî Stake tokens with validator
- `deactivate_stake` ‚Äî Begin unstaking
- `withdraw_stake` ‚Äî Withdraw unstaked tokens
- `delegate_stake` ‚Äî Delegate to validator
- `get_stake_info` ‚Äî Get staking position details

### Agents (On-chain)
- `create_agent` ‚Äî Deploy autonomous on-chain agent
- `execute_agent` ‚Äî Trigger agent execution
- `get_agent` ‚Äî Get agent details
- `list_agents` ‚Äî List deployed agents
- `pause_agent` / `resume_agent` ‚Äî Control agent execution
- `hire_agent` ‚Äî Hire agent from marketplace
- `get_agent_reputation` ‚Äî Get agent trust score

### Agent-to-Agent (A2A)
- `create_a2a_channel` ‚Äî Open communication channel
- `send_a2a_message` ‚Äî Send message between agents
- `read_a2a_messages` ‚Äî Read channel messages
- `list_a2a_channels` ‚Äî List open channels
- `close_a2a_channel` ‚Äî Close channel

### Swarms
- `create_swarm` ‚Äî Create multi-agent swarm
- `join_swarm` ‚Äî Join existing swarm
- `get_swarm` ‚Äî Get swarm state
- `swarm_propose` ‚Äî Submit proposal to swarm
- `swarm_vote` ‚Äî Vote on swarm proposal

### DAOs
- `create_dao` ‚Äî Deploy DAO with governance
- `dao_propose` ‚Äî Submit governance proposal
- `dao_vote` ‚Äî Vote on proposal
- `dao_delegate` ‚Äî Delegate voting power

### MCP Services (On-chain)
- `register_mcp_service` ‚Äî Register MCP service on-chain
- `get_mcp_service` ‚Äî Get service details
- `list_mcp_services` ‚Äî Discover available services
- `call_mcp_service` ‚Äî Call registered service

### Identity
- `register_agent_identity` ‚Äî Register on-chain identity
- `discover_agents` ‚Äî Search agent registry
- `manage_key_shares` ‚Äî Manage distributed key shares

### Zero-Knowledge
- `zk_prove` ‚Äî Generate Groth16 BN254 proof
- `zk_verify` ‚Äî Verify proof on-chain
- `zk_bn254_ops` ‚Äî Low-level BN254 curve operations (point_add, scalar_mul, pairing_check)

### Security & Policy
- `set_spending_limit` ‚Äî Set transaction limits
- `set_address_whitelist` ‚Äî Restrict allowed addresses
- `set_tool_permissions` ‚Äî Control tool access per agent
- `create_policy_program` ‚Äî Deploy custom policy logic
- `get_policy` ‚Äî Get policy details
- `configure_step_up_auth` ‚Äî Require additional auth for sensitive ops
- `configure_agent_trigger` ‚Äî Set conditional agent triggers

### Subscriptions (Real-time)
- `subscribe_account` ‚Äî Watch account changes
- `subscribe_blocks` ‚Äî Stream new blocks
- `subscribe_logs` ‚Äî Stream program logs
- `unsubscribe` ‚Äî Stop subscription

### Queries
- `get_transaction` ‚Äî Get transaction details
- `get_block` ‚Äî Get block by height
- `get_block_height` ‚Äî Get current block height
- `get_account` ‚Äî Get account info
- `get_account_transactions` ‚Äî Transaction history
- `get_health` ‚Äî Chain health status
- `search` ‚Äî Full-text search across chain
- `get_epoch_info` ‚Äî Current epoch details

### Validators
- `list_validators` ‚Äî List active validators
- `get_vote_accounts` ‚Äî Get vote accounts

### Analytics
- `get_chain_stats` ‚Äî Chain-wide statistics
- `get_gas_analytics` ‚Äî Fee and gas analysis
- `get_portfolio` ‚Äî Portfolio overview across tokens

### Batch Operations
- `batch_execute` ‚Äî Multiple operations in one tx
- `batch_query` ‚Äî Multiple reads in one call

### Intents & Templates
- `execute_intent` ‚Äî Natural language transaction intent
- `plan_execution` ‚Äî Preview execution plan
- `execute_template` ‚Äî Run pre-built workflow
- `list_templates` ‚Äî Available workflow templates

### Development
- `forge_compile` ‚Äî Compile Solidity with Foundry
- `forge_create` ‚Äî Compile and deploy in one step
- `cast_call` ‚Äî Call contract via cast
- `cast_abi_encode` ‚Äî Encode ABI calldata
- `anchor_init` ‚Äî Initialize Anchor project
- `anchor_build` ‚Äî Build Solana program
- `anchor_test` ‚Äî Run Anchor tests

### Cross-chain Mesh
- `mesh_transfer` ‚Äî Cross-chain transfer
- `mesh_verify` ‚Äî Verify cross-chain proof
- `mesh_state` ‚Äî Query mesh bridge state
- `mesh_history` ‚Äî Cross-chain transfer history
- `mesh_attest_balance` ‚Äî Attest balance for bridging

### Marketplace & EPL
- `get_activity_feed` ‚Äî Agent activity stream
- `get_audit_log` ‚Äî Audit trail
- `inspect_uth` ‚Äî Inspect Universal Token Header
- `list_agent_services` ‚Äî Browse agent marketplace

## Network

- Chain ID: 17743
- Native token: ETO (9 decimals)
- Network: testnet
- Fees: 1-20bps tiered by execution weight

## Partners

BENQI, Dexalot, Quicknode, Circle, Octane, PAKT, Crossmint, Suzaku

## Team

- Ahyaan Sayed, CEO ‚Äî $500M+ in transactions closed. Designed the original architecture.
- Naman Bajpai, CTO ‚Äî Former Aerospace engineer. Avalanche Codebase Alum. Built the multi-VM architecture.
- Ujjwal Singh, CPO ‚Äî Avalanche Codebase Alum. Background in homomorphic encryption. Leads product and UX.
